name: Beckman Coulter, Inc.
lede: Beckman runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Mumbai, covering manufacturing and R&D, built over fifteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Beckman office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Beckman Coulter, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Beckman runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Mumbai), covering manufacturing and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: HR Director, South West Asia & Danaher Business System (DBS) lead for High Growth Markets HR
Finance Head - South West Asia and Finance Leader- High Growth Market Service

about.description: Beckman's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Mumbai, spanning manufacturing and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Diagnostic Devices, Medical Devices and Equipment

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all six decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Beckman operate in India?
faq.a: Beckman operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Beckman have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Beckman's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Mumbai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Beckman run in India?
faq.a: Beckman runs manufacturing and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Beckman's India GCCs?
faq.a: Beckman's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Beckman's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 6 leaders at Beckman's India centers, across Finance, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
